title: dolomiaea lateritia
intro: Dolomiaea lateritia, also known as the Chinese corydalis or later flowering corydalis, is a plant species that belongs to the Corydalis genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Dolomiaea lateritia include relieving pain, reducing anxiety and insomnia, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also dried and used in infusions to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
